note: Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus (verified present, e.g. Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus/FDeriv, ContDiff, Taylor.lean, MeanValue.lean) is the formal home for differential calculus; Mathlib develops it over general normed/Banach spaces, of which calculus on (finite-dimensional) Euclidean space is the concrete specialization via EuclideanSpace instances -- no dedicated 'calculus on Euclidean space' decl/file exists, so a folder-level container is the honest join.
